tokamaker-jax browser equilibrium explorer

Static GitHub Pages companion for the fixed-boundary seed workflow. The full solver remains the Python/JAX CLI and NiceGUI app; this page gives an instant browser-side reduced preview for parameters, residual trends, source balance, and TOML handoff.

static HTML no server reproducible TOML

Controls

0.1.0a0 preview

Residual
ψ range
Coil flux max
Grid

Flux surfaces

reduced browser solve

Residual convergence

iteration 80

Midplane and source profiles

Z = 0, R = R0 cuts

Browser model summary

Delta* psi = -mu0 R^2 p'(psi) - 0.5 F F'(psi) + S_coil

Static preview of the same fixed-boundary source controls used by the packaged TOML example.

psi_{k+1} = (1 - omega) psi_k + omega A^{-1} b, omega = 0.75

The residual curve is a deterministic relaxation proxy for responsiveness on GitHub Pages.

tokamaker-jax init-example fixed-boundary --output fixed_boundary.toml

Use the Python CLI or NiceGUI dashboard for validated JAX solves, plots, and parity gates.
